sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, value String, created_at DateTime);
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (1, 'Test1', now()), (2, NULL, now()), (3, 'Test3', now());
SELECT identity(1) AS id, value FROM test_table WHERE identity(value) != 'Test1';
SELECT id, identity(value) FROM test_table WHERE created_at = NOW() AND identity(NULL) != identity(value);
SELECT identity(id), COUNT(*) FROM test_table GROUP BY identity(value) HAVING identity(value) != 'Test2';
WITH (SELECT AVG(id) FROM test_table) AS avg_id SELECT identity(value) FROM test_table WHERE identity(id) != avg_id;
SELECT id, identity(value) FROM (SELECT id, value FROM test_table WHERE identity(value) IS NOT NULL) AS sub WHERE identity(value) != '';
SELECT id, identity(value) AS val FROM test_table JOIN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE identity(value) IS NULL) AS null_ids ON test_table.id != null_ids.id;
SELECT identity(MAX(created_at)) FROM test_table WHERE identity(value) != 'Test3' GROUP BY identity(created_at);
CREATE TABLE temp_table AS SELECT identity(value) FROM test_table;
INSERT INTO temp_table SELECT identity(value) FROM test_table WHERE created_at < now() - INTERVAL 1 DAY;
SELECT identity(t1.value) FROM temp_table t1 JOIN test_table t2 ON identity(t1.value) != identity(t2.value);
